'''''Rebel One''''' was a heavily modified [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyer]] that was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
''Rebel One'' retained the same basic design as stock Providences, but included a large, shell-like addition on the rear quarter, below the command tower. Wings and additional engines protruded from either side of this area.

==History==
''Rebel One'' was one of a number of ships that, originally serving with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], was later appropriated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="EGW" />

The ''Rebel One'' served as a [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] for a fleet that was [[Disaster at Deepspace Besh|attacked]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at that time. Heavily damaged, [[Jorin Sol]] managed to jump it to safety.

After escaping the battle, [[YM-2800 limpet ship|Limpet ships]] were used to aid in its repair.<ref name="MBME 5">[[Rebellion 5|''Rebellion'' 5]]</ref>

Afterward, the ''Rebel One'' went on a series of random hyperspace jumps. The hyperdrive failed at the Imperial refueling center of [[Bannistar Station]]. As part of a [[Attack on Bannistar Station|plan to destroy]] the refueling center, the Rebels self-destructed the ''Rebel One'' as Imperial ships moved to board it. This act destroyed a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] and a few [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].<ref name="SM 1">[[Rebellion 11|''Rebellion'' 11]]</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Rebel One'' appears in the [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] comics.
